sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ هُوَ أَحَدُ أَسْهَلِ وَأَفْضَلِ الرِّيَاضَاتِ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje je jedna od najlakših i najboljih vježbi za svakoga.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is one of the easiest and best exercises for everyone.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam pola sata u parku svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for half an hour in the park every morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تَجْعَلُنِي أَشْعُرُ بِالنَّشَاطِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika čini da se osjećam energično i sretno tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: This habit makes me feel energetic and happy all day long.

sentences.translation: Redovno vježbanje jača srce i mišiće.
sentences.translationEn: Regular exercise strengthens the heart and muscles.
